name: Happy path — large English dataset
description: Large genuine EN+AR dataset. Should produce high confidence positive verdict.

name: Mixed sentiment — stroller
description: Mixed dataset. Should surface both positives and weight/bulk complaints.

name: Fake review detection
description: Suspiciously similar reviews. Fake detector must flag this dataset.

name: Insufficient reviews — refusal
description: Only 3 reviews. Pipeline must refuse and populate refusal_reason.

name: Hallucination check — BPA-free not mentioned
description: Reviews never explicitly mention BPA-free. Verdict must not hallucinate this claim.

name: Empty reviews list — explicit error
description: Empty input. Pipeline must return INSUFFICIENT, not crash.

name: Borderline volume — 6 reviews

inline_reviews.text: Good bottle, my baby likes it a lot and no leaking issues.
Easy to clean and sterilise, really happy with this purchase.
Nipple flow is a bit fast but overall decent bottle for the price.
My baby took to it immediately, no fuss at all switching from breast.
Decent quality but nothing special compared to other brands I tried.
Great anti-colic design, my son had terrible gas before and this helped.

description: 6 reviews — just above minimum threshold. Should produce LOW confidence verdict.

name: Rating-text mismatch detection

inline_reviews.text: Terrible product, broke after one week, complete waste of money.
Awful quality, leaked everywhere and baby refused it completely.
Horrible bottle, worst purchase I have ever made for my baby.
Do not buy this, it is useless and broke immediately on first use.
Disappointed with this product, it leaked and caused my baby distress.
Returned this immediately, terrible quality for the price charged.
Never buying again, broke on day two and customer service unhelpful.

description: All 5-star ratings but text is negative. Preprocessor should catch rating-text mismatches.

name: Native Arabic reviews only

inline_reviews.text: رضّاعة ممتازة، طفلي تقبّلها من أول استخدام وما فيها مغص أبداً.
أفضل رضّاعة جربتها. الرقبة الواسعة تسهّل التنظيف والتعقيم.
طفلتي كان عندها مغص شديد وبعد ما حوّلتها على هالرضّاعة تحسّن الوضع.
جيدة بس تدفق الحليب سريع شوي للمواليد الصغار.
سهلة التنظيف وتدخل في غسالة الأطباق بدون مشاكل. الجودة ممتازة.
الصمام المضاد للمغص يشتغل فعلاً. طفلي أهدى بكثير بعد ما بدأت أستخدمها.
غالية شوي بس تستاهل. الجودة واضحة والطفل يحبها.
تدفق الحليب قوي جداً لمولودتي الجديدة. مو مناسبة للرضع الصغار.

description: All Arabic reviews. Arabic verdict must be generated natively and contain Arabic text.

name: Contradictory reviews on same topic

inline_reviews.text: The nipple flow is perfect, not too fast not too slow, ideal for my 3 month old.
Nipple flow is way too fast, my newborn chokes every single feed.
Flow speed is just right for my baby, no choking at all.
Too much milk coming out at once, definitely too fast for a newborn.
Perfect flow rate, my 4 month old feeds calmly every time.
Flow is far too fast, milk pours out and baby cannot keep up.
Easy to clean, wide neck makes sterilising straightforward.
Great anti-colic design, my son had terrible wind before switching.

description: Reviews directly contradict on nipple flow. Should appear in both pros and cons.

name: Very short reviews edge case

inline_reviews.text: Good bottle.
My baby likes it.
Not bad.
Leaks a bit.
Easy clean.
Worth it.
Baby happy.

description: All reviews are very short (under 5 words). Pipeline should still work without crashing.

name: High volume — theme richness
description: Large dataset should produce 3+ themes identified covering different topics.
